  "findings": [
    "Open stud bays at floor transitions lack required fireblocking to prevent the passage of flame and hot gases."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking materials at all floor-to-wall transitions to seal the open stud bays before closing in the walls."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under IRC R302.11, fireblocking must be provided in concealed spaces of stud walls and partitions, including at all interconnections between vertical and horizontal spaces such as floor-to-wall transitions. Leaving these bays open creates a continuous path for fire spread, which is a critical code violation.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R302.11"
  ]
}
